     Note: the Tag Studio application source is closed. This public repo accepts
     contributions to the bundled template library, the docs, and the README. -->

## Changes

## Type

- [ ] New template (`templates/`)
- [ ] Template fix
- [ ] Docs (`docs/`, `SECURITY.md`, `DISCLAIMER.md`)
- [ ] README / chore
- [ ] Other (no app-source changes — the application source is closed)

## Verification

<!-- How did you verify this? Tag Studio ships as a Windows app. -->
- [ ] For a template: it is valid JSON with the top-level `name`, `description`,
      `category`, `machineCompat` fields and a `doc` object (`doc.page` in inches,
      `doc.dpi`, `doc.elements`), and it opens/exports correctly in the app.
- [ ] For docs/README: links resolve and rendered Markdown looks correct.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch named with a `fix/`, `feat/`, `chore/`, or `docs/` prefix
- [ ] Scope is limited to templates, docs, or README (no closed application source)
- [ ] Updated the README template table if a bundled template was added/renamed
- [ ] No credentials, client/site/equipment identifiers, or other PII included
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in
